name: HAKAFAST On-Premise Kiosk
description: API contract for MSI / embedded admin + transponder bridge on closed networks

requiredHeaders.x-hf-workspace: UUID workspace id — same device/session as admin UI

body.transponder_id: string|number — kart number or mapped transponder id

body.lap_time_sec: optional — omit to auto-compute from last crossing

environment.HF_KIOSK_MODE: Set to 1 when packaged as on-premise kiosk
environment.HF_TRACK_SLUG: Default track for local MSI install
environment.HF_WORKSPACE_ID: Optional fixed workspace UUID for kiosk station
